steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: In a field where creativity and inventiveness are prized, readers who see the novel as merely fictionalized true events underestimate its creative achievement.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: A directly fits: the work would appear less imaginatively accomplished than it actually is. The other three fail—they address identifying real counterparts, prescribing authorial decisions, or critic disagreement never mentioned in the passage. That matches choice A — A is correct.
